shellCommands.command: python3 -m venv /home/user/workspace/vectorops_venv && source /home/user/workspace/vectorops_venv/bin/activate && pip install --quiet build 2>&1 | tail -3

source /home/user/workspace/vectorops_venv/bin/activate && nohup python -m pypiserver run -p 8080 --passwords "" --authenticate "" /home/user/workspace/pypi_server/packages > /home/user/workspace/pypi_server/pypiserver.log 2>&1 &
echo "PID=$!"

kill 2094 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.5
source /home/user/workspace/vectorops_venv/bin/activate
nohup python -m pypiserver run -p 8080 -a . -P . --disable-fallback /home/user/workspace/pypi_server/packages > /home/user/workspace/pypi_server/pypiserver.log 2>&1 &
echo "PID=$!"
python3 -m venv /home/user/workspace/test_venv && source /home/user/workspace/test_venv/bin/activate && pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 2>&1

source /home/user/workspace/test_venv/bin/activate && python -c "
from vectorops import dotproduct
result = dotproduct([1, 1], [0, 1])
assert result == 1, f'Expected 1, got {result}'
print(f'dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]) = {result}')

# Additional tests
print(f'dotproduct([1,2,3], [4,5,6]) = {dotproduct([1,2,3], [4,5,6])}')
print(f'dotproduct([], []) = {dotproduct([], [])}')
print('All tests passed!')
"
source /home/user/workspace/test_venv/bin/activate && python -c "from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]); print('Exact user assertion passed')"
ps aux | grep pypiserver | grep -v grep
